'''Endregaad''', a [[Planet/Legends|world]] near the [[Indrexu Spiral]], was the [[oasis mother]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

==History==
It was once a member-world of [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]]. Once a swampy, wet world, its [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] evaporated, making it into an arid, dusty world of valleys, plateaus, mesas, and colorful rock formations of red [[Sandstone/Legends|sandstone]] and blue [[Granite/Legends|granite]]. It was plagued by windstorms and sandstorms. [[Geode (rock)|Geodes]] were [[Mining/Legends|mined]] for their [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]].

At some point, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] subjugated the planet.

A plague sparked by the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Tempest (spice)|Tempest]] struck Endregaad in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], and the world was quarantined by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].<ref name="Scourge">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>
